subcodes.first_line: Remember thou My handmaiden from among My handmaidens, who hath believed in her Lord and was numbered among the devoted ones, in a Tablet of mighty glory. O [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری امه من امائی التی آمنت بربها و کانت من القانتات فی لوح عز عظیم ان یا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
